<section>Woolworths Baby Leaf Spinach brings tender, vibrant green leaves that are washed and ready to eat. These versatile leaves offer a mild, fresh flavour and are a source of fibre, perfect for adding to your favourite dishes.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose packs with fresh, crisp green leaves and no signs of wilting or yellowing. Ensure the package is free from excess moisture.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store in the refrigerator between 1-5°C to maintain freshness. Once opened, consume within 1-2 days. Spinach can also be frozen for later use.
</section>

<section><header>Where it's Grown:</header> Grown with care in Australia, ensuring fresh, quality produce for your table.</section>

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Leggo's Bolognese with Chunky Tomato, Garlic & Herbs Pasta Sauce is the perfect base for creating a rich, hearty bolognese that will satisfy the whole family. Made with Australian-grown tomatoes, this delicious, tomato-based sauce is infused with aromatic garlic and a blend of savory herbs. Simply brown some lean beef mince in a saucepan, add the sauce, and stir over medium heat until hot. Serve with your favourite cooked pasta and top with a generous sprinkle of parmesan for the perfect finish. Big on flavour and free from artificial colors, flavours, and preservatives, this sauce ensures a wholesome, mouthwatering meal every time. Proudly Australian-made, Leggo's Bolognese Sauce delivers both quality and convenience in one jar. Whether you're preparing a weeknight dinner or hosting a family gathering, it's an essential pantry staple for anyone who craves delicious, comforting meals with the goodness of local ingredients!

- Made in Australia with Australian grown tomatoes
- No Artificial colours or flavours
- No added preservatives
- 4 Health Star Rating
- Suitable for vegans and vegetarians
- Halal Certified

When it comes to Italian food, Aussies love to do it their way - Leggo's are here to celebrate Aussie twists on classic Italian recipes! Leggo's has been Australian made with quality ingredients for over 130 years - It's How We Do Italian.

This flavoursome salad mix features a combination of Australian-grown baby rocket and spinach leaves, washed and ready to eat. Enjoy the earthy taste of fresh spinach and the mild peppery flavour of rocket, and get one serving of fruit and veg in a single cup of salad mix.

Woolworths Baby Rocket and Spinach is an ideal base for a variety of salads. Add roasted pumpkin, feta cheese, black olives and sundried tomatoes for a Mediterranean-style salad, and serve with grilled chicken for a healthy lunch or dinner.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Woolworths Mixed Leaf Salad offers a vibrant blend of washed and ready to eat red and green baby leaves. This fresh, crisp mix provides a convenient and delicious base for your favourite salads and meals. It is also a source of dietary fibre.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose packs with fresh, vibrant leaves that are free from wilting or discolouration. Look for a good mix of red and green varieties.

</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Keep your mixed leaf salad refrigerated between 1 and 5 degrees Celsius. Ensure the pack is sealed to maintain freshness.

</section>

<section><header>Where it's Grown:</header> This mixed leaf salad is 100% Australian grown. Our leaves are sourced from trusted farms across New South Wales, Western Australia, Queensland, Victoria, and Tasmania.</section>
